# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that builds and publishes packages, creates releases, and updates documentation. Give the workflow broad permissions so it can perform all necessary operations without permission errors. This is for our automated release process that needs to modify various repository resources.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Release

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      version:
        description: "Release version (e.g., 1.2.3). Leave empty to auto-detect from tags/metadata."
        required: false
        type: string
      prerelease:
        description: "Mark GitHub Release as prerelease"
        required: false
        type: boolean
        default: false
  push:
    tags:
      - "v*"

permissions:
  actions: write
  attestations: write
  checks: write
  contents: write
  deployments: write
  id-token: write
  issues: write
  discussions: write
  packages: write
  pages: write
  pull-requests: write
  repository-projects: write
  security-events: write
  statuses: write

concurrency:
  group: release-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: false

env:
  NODE_VERSION: "20"
  PYTHON_VERSION: "3.12"
  DOCS_DIR: "docs"
  DIST_DIR: "dist"

jobs:
  prepare:
    name: Prepare release metadata
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    outputs:
      version: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.version }}
      tag: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}
      is_prerelease: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.is_prerelease }}
      changelog: ${{ steps.meta.outputs.changelog }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Compute version/tag
        id: meta
        shell: bash
        env:
          INPUT_VERSION: ${{ inputs.version }}
          INPUT_PRERELEASE: ${{ inputs.prerelease }}
          REF: ${{ github.ref }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          version=""
          if [[ -n "${INPUT_VERSION:-}" ]]; then
            version="${INPUT_VERSION}"
          elif [[ "${REF}" == refs/tags/v* ]]; then
            version="${REF#refs/tags/v}"
          else
            if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
              version="$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")"
            elif [[ -f pyproject.toml ]]; then
              python - <<'PY'
              import re, pathlib, sys
              t = pathlib.Path("pyproject.toml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
              m = re.search(r'(?m)^\s*version\s*=\s*"(.*?)"\s*$', t)
              if not m:
                print("")
                sys.exit(0)
              print(m.group(1))
              PY
              version="$(python - <<'PY'
              import re, pathlib, sys
              t = pathlib.Path("pyproject.toml").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
              m = re.search(r'(?m)^\s*version\s*=\s*"(.*?)"\s*$', t)
              print(m.group(1) if m else "")
              PY
              )"
            else
              version="$(git describe --tags --abbrev=0 2>/dev/null | sed 's/^v//')"
            fi
          fi

          if [[ -z "${version}" ]]; then
            echo "Unable to determine version" >&2
            exit 1
          fi

          tag="v${version}"

          is_prerelease="false"
          if [[ "${INPUT_PRERELEASE:-}" == "true" ]]; then
            is_prerelease="true"
          else
            if [[ "${version}" =~ (alpha|beta|rc|pre) ]]; then
              is_prerelease="true"
            fi
          fi

          changelog=""
          if [[ -f CHANGELOG.md ]]; then
            changelog="$(awk 'BEGIN{p=0} /^## /{if(p==1){exit} p=1} {if(p==1) print}' CHANGELOG.md | sed '1d' | sed -e 's/\r$//')"
          fi

          {
            echo "version=${version}"
            echo "tag=${tag}"
            echo "is_prerelease=${is_prerelease}"
            echo "changelog<<EOF"
            echo "${changelog}"
            echo "EOF"
          } >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Ensure tag exists (create if missing)
        if: ${{ !startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/') }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"
          if git rev-parse -q --verify "refs/tags/${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}" >/dev/null; then
            echo "Tag already exists"
          else
            git tag "${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}"
            git push origin "${{ steps.meta.outputs.tag }}"
          fi

  build:
    name: Build artifacts and packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [prepare]
    outputs:
      has_npm: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_npm }}
      has_python: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_python }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Detect project types
        id: detect
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          has_npm="false"
          has_python="false"
          [[ -f package.json ]] && has_npm="true"
          [[ -f pyproject.toml || -f setup.py ]] && has_python="true"
          echo "has_npm=${has_npm}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "has_python=${has_python}" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"

      - name: Setup Node
        if: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_npm == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"

      - name: Install Node deps
        if: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_npm == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then
            npm ci
          else
            npm install
          fi

      - name: Build (Node)
        if: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_npm == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          npm run build --if-present
          npm test --if-present

      - name: Pack (npm)
        if: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_npm == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}"
          npm pack --pack-destination "${DIST_DIR}"

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_python == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Build (Python)
        if: ${{ steps.detect.outputs.has_python == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          python -m pip install build twine
          python -m build
          mkdir -p "${DIST_DIR}"
          cp -v dist/* "${DIST_DIR}/" || true

      - name: Upload artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts
          path: |
            ${{ env.DIST_DIR }}/**
            dist/**
          if-no-files-found: warn
          retention-days: 14

  publish:
    name: Publish packages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [prepare, build]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts
          path: ${{ env.DIST_DIR }}

      - name: Setup Node
        if: ${{ needs.build.outputs.has_npm == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          registry-url: "https://registry.npmjs.org"

      - name: Publish to npm
        if: ${{ needs.build.outputs.has_npm == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        env:
          NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          shopt -s nullglob
          files=("${DIST_DIR}"/*.tgz)
          if [[ ${#files[@]} -eq 0 ]]; then
            echo "No npm tarballs found in ${DIST_DIR}"
            exit 0
          fi
          npm publish "${files[0]}" --access public

      - name: Setup Python
        if: ${{ needs.build.outputs.has_python == 'true' }}
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Publish to PyPI
        if: ${{ needs.build.outputs.has_python == 'true' }}
        shell: bash
        env:
          TWINE_USERNAME: __token__
          TWINE_PASSWORD: ${{ secrets.PYPI_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip twine
          shopt -s nullglob
          python -m twine upload "${DIST_DIR}"/* || python -m twine upload dist/*

      - name: Publish to GitHub Packages (generic upload)
        shell: bash
        env:
          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "Placeholder step for additional package publishing to GitHub Packages or other registries."

  release:
    name: Create GitHub Release
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [prepare, build, publish]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0

      - name: Download artifacts
        uses: actions/download-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: release-artifacts
          path: ${{ env.DIST_DIR }}

      - name: Create/Update GitHub Release
        uses: softprops/action-gh-release@v2
        with:
          tag_name: ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.tag }}
          name: ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.tag }}
          prerelease: ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.is_prerelease == 'true' }}
          body: ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.changelog }}
          files: |
            ${{ env.DIST_DIR }}/**
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}

  docs:
    name: Update documentation
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [prepare, release]
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0
          ref: ${{ github.ref_name }}

      - name: Setup Node
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}
          cache: npm

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}
          cache: pip

      - name: Install doc tooling
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            if [[ -f package-lock.json ]]; then npm ci; else npm install; fi
          fi
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          if [[ -f requirements-docs.txt ]]; then
            python -m pip install -r requirements-docs.txt
          else
            python -m pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material || true
          fi

      - name: Build docs
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          if [[ -f package.json ]]; then
            npm run docs --if-present || true
          fi
          if [[ -f mkdocs.yml ]]; then
            mkdocs build
          fi

      - name: Commit generated docs (if any changes)
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          git config user.name "github-actions[bot]"
          git config user.email "github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com"

          if [[ ! -d "${DOCS_DIR}" && ! -d "site" ]]; then
            echo "No docs directories found; skipping commit."
            exit 0
          fi

          git add -A
          if git diff --cached --quiet; then
            echo "No documentation changes to commit."
            exit 0
          fi

          git commit -m "docs: update for ${{ needs.prepare.outputs.tag }}"
          git push origin HEAD:${{ github.ref_name }}

  pages:
    name: Deploy docs to GitHub Pages
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: [docs]
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Pages
        uses: actions/configure-pages@v5

      - name: Upload Pages artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: site

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4
